description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the gradle:7.6.4-jdk17 Docker image. Set a before_script to export GRADLE_USER_HOME to the .gradle directory in the project and define a GRADLE_OPTS variable to disable the daemon. Define a cache for .gradle, build and any */build/ directories. Add a build job in the build stage that runs `gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace assemble`. Add a test job in the test stage that runs `gradle --build-cache --full-stacktrace check` followed by `gradle jacocoReport`.
